name: PPAP Automotive Limited
summary: PPAP Automotive Limited manufactures and sells automotive sealing systems, and interior and exterior automotive parts in India. Its automotive sealing systems include weather strip outers, weather strip inner molding roofs, molding windshields, air spoilers, trim door openings, rail component side doors, cowl top seals, sun roof drain hoses, trim door openings, back door openings, weather strip trunk lids, door seals, secondary seals, hood seals, air DAMs, seat liners, roof mouldings, door partitions, CTR uppers, glass run channels, slide rails, door sub seals, door seals, DAM windshields, and waist seal outers. The company's interior and exterior injection molded products comprise door trims, pillar garnishes, lining rear panels, rear trays, trunk sides, tail gates, weather strip partitions, instrument panels, cover engine upper/under, ECU covers, box batteries, molding hoods, fender inners, splash guards, duct cooling products, fuel pipes, cover steering joints, center console with boot components, bumpers, fender linings, fog lamps garnish products, radiator grill garnish products, body side moldings, rear bumper garnish products, wheel covers, door sashes, corner covers, door mouldings, rear pillars, trunk linings, LNG rear panels, CTR pillar lowers, and front pillars. It also exports its products to Japan, Brazil, Mexico, Venezuela, Thailand, the United Kingdom, South Africa, Argentina, and the United States. The company primarily serves automotive manufacturers. The company was formerly known as Precision Pipes and Profiles Co. Ltd. and changed its name to PPAP Automotive Limited in May 2014. PPAP Automotive Limited was founded in 1978 and is based in Noida, India.
